prompt: A photorealistic fashion magazine cover featuring a portrait of a beautiful young Asian woman. She has light brown hair with blonde highlights and a braided crown, soft elegant makeup, and a gentle expression. She is wearing a white ribbed off-the-shoulder top with spaghetti straps and delicate gold drop earrings. The background is a soft, textured neutral gray. The layout includes elegant typography: a large masthead at the top reading "LUMINA" in a classic serif font. On the left side, text reads "THE NEW ERA OF AI BEAUTY" above a larger "STYLE EVOLUTION". On the right side, text reads "FUTURE FASHION" above "WHAT'S NEXT?". At the bottom, text reads "BEAUTY SECRETS of TOMORROW" above "ELEGANT & CHIC". The overall lighting is soft, professional studio illumination.
